_doc: Default template when first run on Linux (e.g. Ubuntu 24.04.x). sudo must be non-interactive (NOPASSWD) or use your own script paths.

ubuntu.label: Linux host — reboot default GRUB entry (index 0)

windows.label: Linux host — next boot Windows (edit menu title to match grub.cfg)
args: sudo grub-reboot 'Windows Boot Manager' && sudo reboot
